rule: Never post or queue the same canonical fact/snippet twice. fact_key blocks repeated facts; fingerprint blocks repeated wording.

items.copy: Agents need operating context, not just prompts. The hard part is moving what a senior teammate knows into the system.
items.note: Shortened for 8bitconcepts account limit on first post.

items.copy: The AI Dev Board index had 9,161 AI/ML roles across 524 companies on 2026-04-27.
Model API fees are usually 10-20% of what AI costs to ship. The rest is data prep, integration, evals, observability, maintenance, and process change.
items.approved_final_copy: Model API fees are usually 10-20% of what AI costs to ship. The rest is data prep, integration, evals, observability, maintenance, and process change.
facts_verified: https://8bitconcepts.com/research/the-integration-tax.html returned HTTP 200
The source page states model API costs are 10-20% of what AI actually costs to ship
The source page identifies data prep, integration, evaluation/testing, observability, annual maintenance, and process change as major non-model cost centers
items.note: Refreshed through social-editor and posted by 8bit-x-agent-publisher from verified @8BitConcepts.

items.copy: Only 6.6% of classified AI/ML roles were entry-level. Senior, lead, and principal roles made up 67%.
Live MCP check: 417 of 7,118 agent-ready sites pass a real MCP handshake. That is 5.9%.
5,027 of 7,040 agent-ready sites publish llms.txt. The easier discovery file is winning; live MCP is still the bottleneck.
Live MCP check: 417 of 7,125 agent-ready sites pass a real MCP handshake. That is 5.9%.
Not Human Search is tracking 4,216 agent-ready sites. Average agent-readiness score: 35/100.

items.copy: Developer is 23.8% of the current NHS digest: 1,691 of 7,091 sites. That points to where the agent-ready web is thickest: APIs, infra, package intelligence, monitoring, and workflow tooling. https://8bitconcepts.com/research/q2-2026-mcp-ecosystem-health.html
items.note: Original drafted category-share stat was refreshed to live digest values before posting. Verified counts: developer=1691, total_sites=7091, generated_at=2026-05-03T04:55:45Z. X specialist closeout: No scoped memory update needed.

items.copy: 7,040 agent-ready sites were indexed, but only 407 passed a live JSON-RPC MCP handshake. That is 5.8%.

AI Dev Board is tracking 9,906 AI/ML roles across 527 companies.

That is enough live supply for agents to query the AI hiring market directly instead of scraping job pages.

https://aidevboard.com

items.copy: Live MCP check: 418 of 7,117 agent-ready sites pass a real MCP handshake. That is 5.9%.
AI project budget, before launch: tokens. AI project budget, after launch: permissions, evals, workflow, observability, retries, owners, rollback plans, and one cursed CSV export.

In 3,548 salary-disclosed AI/ML engineering roles, research roles average $279,788. Generative-AI roles average $233,414, despite having about 2.6x more openings.

Scarcity still pays.
items.blocker: tools/x-brave-post.js authenticated the @8BitConcepts session, but direct CreateTweet returned AuthorizationError 344 (daily limit reached) and the browser fallback then failed `X composer keyboard entry verification` with only a newline in the editor. No live status URL was created.
